title: Business Manager
description:
Job Overview

Reporting to the Business Development Director, the Business Manager is responsible for securing and retaining target client accounts through professional, consultative sales activities. Building trusted client relationships and an in-depth knowledge of key client accounts you will work closely with other members of the MedComms and Marketing Platform team, to propose high quality multi-channel solutions that exceed client expectations and financial targets. This is a sales target driven role for a proactive business development role. The role will service both APAC regional and Singapore clients as required.

Job Responsibilities

  • Instigate and lead business development activities for assigned accounts to achieve assigned order and revenue targets; develop account planning activities in collaboration with the account service team to identify growth and cross-sell opportunities.
  • Develop consultative relationships and a deep client understanding to drive organic account growth
  • Proactively source and progress new business leads (cold outreach, networking, industry events, partner referrals).
  • Keep up to date with industry trends and initiatives to support strategic account planning and ensure proposals are innovative and relevant
  • In partnership with other members of the MedComms and Marketing Platform team, develop consultative relationships and a deep client understanding to enable you to propose strategic multichannel solutions that exceed client expectations and drive account growth
  • Facilitate, in conjunction with other key stakeholders, Master Services Agreements and preferred supplier status with all key accounts where applicable
  • Manage and coordinate RFI and RFP process, prepare detailed proposals and budget estimates and manage client and procurement negotiations whilst maintaining profitability
  • Develop and deliver new business pitches to senior client stakeholders in conjunction with other members of the MedComms and Marketing Platform team.
  • Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline forecasts; meet/exceed monthly and quarterly revenue targets.

Requirements:

  • 3 years of key account management experience ideally in a medical communications agency, pharmaceutical, consumer health or equivalent environment, preferably with digital experience.
  • Proven BD/ sales hunting track record in Advertising, MedComms or other publication solutions to pharmaceutical companies.
  • Comfortable working in a matrix environment and collaborating with creative/medical/digital teams
  • Experience managing end-to-end proposal and negotiation processes (RFI/RFP, budgets, contracts).
  • Ability to work with others to develop winning multi-channel communications proposals
  • Excellent written and verbal communication, presentation, and client facing skills
  • Strong financial and business acumen
  • Highly organized, self-motivated and result oriented
  • Strong scientific curiosity with a university degree (BSc, MSc or PhD) in a scientific subject preferred

Preferred:

  • Regional client exposure (APAC/SEA) or experience supporting cross-border accounts
  • Direct experience selling MedComms, advertising, digital solutions or publication services to pharma/healthcare clients.
  • Existing network within regional pharmaceutical/medical device procurement or marketing functions

Key Behaviours:

  • Hunter mindset: proactive, resilient, and comfortable with cold outreach and pipeline building.
  • Consultative salesperson: listens, diagnoses, and proposes strategic solutions.
  • Team collaborator: works closely with delivery teams while driving commercial outcomes.
  • Learning agility and curiosity: keeps up with industry and therapy trends.
  • Energetic, positive and persuasive presenter

postedCompany.description:
MIMS PTE. LTD.

MIMS is a leading healthcare media company providing tailored solutions to a global healthcare market. We provide reference data, decision support solutions, news and education to communities of general practitioners, specialist doctors, pharmacists, nurses and patients across 13 countries.

We produce a range of professional media including data-rich directories, electronic and online products, journals and face-to-face meetings. The established and trusted reputation of our brands means that many of them are embedded in the daily workflow of the healthcare communities they serve.

Serving healthcare professionals in Asia for nearly 40 years, MIMS is focused on providing tools to meet physicians' needs in their daily practice, as well as committing to support lifelong learning needs of healthcare professionals and consumers.

MIMS Drug Information System is the most advanced, complete, and up-to-date information source on available products, delivering critical information needed at every point of care. MIMS Drug Information System is delivered across multiple platforms and channels, available in print, online and LAN, standalone or integrated.

In the area of Continuing Medical Education, MIMS has developed a diverse platform of educational products and services in the form of live events, enduring materials in print, e-media and web.
postedCompany.name: MIMS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
